name: A Sad Conclusion
description:
Heya... so, the site has gone through the shitter. This may seem alright right now, but behind the scenes, my own boundaries are being broken by the web itself.

I am not good enough to explain this, nor am I one of the people who are heavily affected. But from what I read and heard, I cannot stand for these things and such, I will be removing myself from this place entirely.

I do plan on looking for places to move to, but for now I will just be drafting a lot of my progress here so I can move somewhere else. Oh! I wont leave you in the dark, please refer to this bot here to see the current thing that is happening.

Read here (this is a link in JAI itself so no need to worry)

I will still be a little active until I manage to save all my works. I will not delete this profile nor bots as if in case you guys still stay (I will not blame you) a part of my history is still enjoyed.

Sorry it had to be like this. And I will be looking for possible other places that I can make characters that new people will get to enjoy. For now, I will be around, and will see you later.

If you have any recommendations on where I can start again, please sent it at my Revospring.
creator: Mage the Last
